payload.answer: Cannot commit durable memory from this input because the article fetch failed with a 404 network error and no article content was provided.

entity_resolution.reason: The provided URL could not be fetched; only a 404 network error was available, so there is no reliable article content to resolve into memory.

details: Input contained only a malformed-looking URL and a 404 fetch failure.

repair_options: Provide the article text or a successful fetch result.
If you want to remember the failed fetch itself, specify that explicitly as the target memory.
